title: Kashyyyk Islands
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Kashyyyk_Islands_BF1.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A Wookiee village in the Kashyyyk Islands.]]
The '''Kashyyyk Islands''' on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] was the location of the [[Wookiee Trade Guild]] headquarters. The islands contained a small village, a harbor and a landing zone and was also the site of a [[Kashyyyk Trade Rebellion|battle]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. The Wookiee Trade Guild opposed the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] taxation, leading to an attack on the islands by an army of recently revealed [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]]. Along with the assistance of [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] and droid air support, the droid army quickly laid waste to the [[Army of the Wookiee Trade Guild]]. Because no survivors remained, word of the attack never got out.
